description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a long, dramatic trench coat with wide lapels and metallic buttons, giving off a stylish and somewhat rebellious urban vibe. The coat is worn open, revealing a fitted shirt underneath, a large belt with a prominent buckle, and slim pants tucked into high boots. The figure's gloves are fingerless, and the sleeves of the coat are rolled up to the elbows, exposing forearm guards. The character has short, layered hair with a side part, and his facial expression is stern and confident. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a modern urban adventurer or action hero, with detailed accessories and a strong, upright posture.
description: A male adult in a long trench coat, fingerless gloves, and boots, exuding a confident, urban action-hero style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open trench coat, detailed belt buckle, fingerless gloves, and stern facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coat's length, rolled-up sleeves, and the profile of the boots and gloves.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back detailing of the trench coat, including seams, buttons, and the layered hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coat's drape, arm position, and boot profile.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat with wide lapels, fitted shirt, slim pants, fingerless gloves, and high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short layered hair with a side part
